ddls:
CREATE TABLE "match_analysis" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "competition" TEXT /* Competition name */,
  "match_round" TEXT /* Match round (e.g., Matchweek 1) */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the match is played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match is held */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Home or away match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., W, D, L) */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the home team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the opponent */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "expected_goals" REAL /* Expected goals scored by the home team */,
  "expected_goals_against" REAL /* Expected goals conceded by the home team */,
  "possession_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of possession during the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the match */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Captain of the team during the match */,
  "formation" TEXT /* Formation used by the team */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Referee officiating the match */,
  "match_report" TEXT /* Link to the match report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the match */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to external resources or articles */,
  "delta" INTEGER /* Delta value for analysis */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "injury_time" INTEGER /* Total injury time added during the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "corner_kicks" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "offside" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties awarded */,
  "penalties_scored" INTEGER /* Number of penalties scored */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed */,
  "match_rating" INTEGER /* Overall match rating */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the coach who managed the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the team playing the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the opponent team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "coach_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "coach_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "coach_start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started managing the team */,
  "coach_end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach ended managing the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the team */,
  "team_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "team_venue" TEXT /* Home venue of the team */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Current manager of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponent" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "opponent_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the opponent team */,
  "opponent_venue" TEXT /* Home venue of the opponent team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the team the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_player" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Red cards received by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Shots on target by the player */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Shots off target by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Fouls suffered by the player */,
  "player_rating" INTEGER /* Player rating for the match (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "player_id")
)
column_names: Day of the week the match is played
Venue where the match is held
Result of the match (e.g., W, D, L)
Goals scored by the home team
Expected goals scored by the home team
Expected goals conceded by the home team

Foreign key to the team playing the match
Foreign key to the opponent team

Date the coach started managing the team
Date the coach ended managing the team (if applicable)
